keyPoints: Framing: Frame is the basic unit of data transmission
Flow Control: Prevents data over-transmission and ensures proper flow of data
Error Control: Detects, corrects and prevents data errors
Connectionless: No connection established between devices, data sent independently
Connection Oriented: Establishes a connection before data transmission
Data link layer protocols: SDLC, HDLC, PPP, Ethernet, Frame Relay
High Level Data Link: DLC, it provides framing, error detection and correction, flow control, etc.
